---
title: "test_thewatcher_integrity_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_thewatcher_integrity_empire.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.97
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.85
---

## Intent
The `test_thewatcher_integrity_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestTheWatcher, watcher, test_record_edit_fatigue, test_record_edit_oscillation, test_is_locked_cooldown. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestTheWatcher, watcher, test_record_edit_fatigue, test_record_edit_oscillation, test_is_locked_cooldown. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [time](file://time)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)

### Exports
- `TestTheWatcher`
- `watcher`
- `test_record_edit_fatigue`
- `test_record_edit_oscillation`
- `test_is_locked_cooldown`
